title: Cursor Plugin Manifest (dotnet-ai-kit)
description: Schema for .cursor-plugin/plugin.json modeled on the verified working example at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cursor/plugins/main/agent-compatibility/.cursor-plugin/plugin.json. Manifest field is `agents` (NOT `subagents`); field value is a scalar relative path `./agents/` (NOT array). Verified agent frontmatter (per cursor/plugins/agent-compatibility/agents/startup-review.md): `name`, `description`, `model`, `readonly`. The `agents` field is conditional in this v1 release per spec A-005: if the spike fixture under `./agents/` passes (CHK003), full Cursor agent generation lands; if the fixture fails, the `agents` field MUST be removed from the manifest and spec/checklist/release notes updated in the same PR per the cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md binding rule.

skills.description: Scalar relative path to the skills directory.

rules.description: Scalar relative path to the generated Cursor .mdc rule directory. Replaces the legacy one-blob .cursor/rules/dotnet-ai-kit.mdc behavior (research R12).

agents.description: Per cursor/plugins/agent-compatibility evidence: scalar relative path to the agents directory at the plugin root. Conditional on the A-005 spike fixture passing. If the fixture fails, this field MUST be absent and the cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md binding rule triggers.
